summary: Iteration 12: Testing Whisper Transcription and Claude Summarization for Meeting Recordings. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). UI verification confirmed all required elements present. AI Summary toggle and sections only appear after audio upload (correctly implemented).

details: POST /api/admin/meetings/{meeting_id}/recording endpoint exists
Endpoint requires authentication (returns 401/403 without auth)
Endpoint validates meeting_id (returns 404 for non-existent meeting)
Endpoint requires 'file' parameter (returns 422 if missing)
Endpoint accepts audio files via multipart form data
Uses emergentintegrations.llm.openai.OpenAISpeechToText
Model: whisper-1
API key from EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable
Prompt: 'This is a pastoral counseling session between a pastor and church member.'
Uses emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat
Model: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929
API key from EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable
System message: Pastoral meeting assistant with warm, confidential tone
Output format: Key Discussion Points, Spiritual/Emotional Needs, Action Items, Next Steps, Prayer Points
Meeting Slots card with date/time inputs and Add Slot button
Scheduled Meetings card showing all booked meetings
Save Notes, Record Meeting, Upload Audio buttons per meeting
Textarea for pastoral notes
Status display (SCHEDULED/COMPLETED)
Meeting time and member info displayed
Collapsible 'AI Meeting Summary' button with Sparkles icon
Toggle uses ChevronUp/ChevronDown icons for expand/collapse state
Only appears when meeting.summary or meeting.transcript exists
Clicking toggle expands/collapses AI content section
AI Summary box with Sparkles icon and formatted markdown
Transcript box with FileText icon and plain text content
Markdown **bold** converted to <strong> tags

Newlines converted to
tags
data-testid attributes for testing: meeting-ai-{id}, meeting-summary-{id}, meeting-transcript-{id}

critical_code_review_comments: Whisper and Claude integrations properly configured using emergentintegrations library
EMERGENT_LLM_KEY environment variable is set in backend/.env
AI Summary section correctly conditionally renders only when transcript/summary exists
All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
MOCKED: Teams/Slack notifications (notify_meeting_event returns mocked responses)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_whisper_claude_iter12.py - New test suite for Whisper/Claude integration
seed_data_creation: None - using existing meeting data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Whisper transcription and Claude summarization are configured and ready. The AI Summary toggle button only appears after an audio file is uploaded and processed. Currently no meetings have transcripts (AI Summary toggles show 0 count). To test actual transcription, upload an audio file via the Upload Audio button on any scheduled meeting - this will consume API credits. All backend endpoint validations pass. MeetingsAdminPage has full data-testid coverage.

mocked_apis_list: notify_meeting_event - Returns mocked Teams/Slack notification responses

note: Per main agent instructions, actual audio upload was NOT tested to avoid consuming API credits. Endpoint structure, authentication, and validation were thoroughly tested instead.
